emails.subject: Re: vehicle rental in Gillette
emails.body: Re: vehicle rental in Gillette Shonnie, I suggest that if we're unable to rent from either Avis or National, that we elect the same levels of insurance coverage under the rental agreement with Enterprise as we have negotiated in the corporate contracts. As information, here is the summary of the insurance provided under the corporate rental car agreements (this can be found at the intranet site <URL> Car Rental Contracts Rental car contracts for January 1, 2000, through December 31, 2000 have been awarded to: National Car Rental and Avis Rent A Car System, Inc. When you rent a vehicle from National or Avis under the Contract, the daily rental rate includes two kinds of insurance: L/DW(Loss/Damage Waiver) This is what is called Comprehensive or Collision on your personal auto. It covers the rental vehicle and pays for and damage to it. Liability This covers persons and property outside the rental vehicle. For both National and Avis, the coverage is $100,000 per person/$300,000 per occurrence, and $50,000 for property damage. These coverage's only apply when the vehicle is rented at the contract rate using the following state contract identifier numbers: National 5000838 Avis A288200 Please call Tracy Ramsey (Travel Manager) at 713/646-8311 if you have any questions.
